# synix

> A build system for agent memory

## What it does

Synix transforms raw conversations (ChatGPT, Claude, text files) into structured memory artifacts through declarative Python pipelines. It provides content-addressed caching, incremental rebuilds, and full provenance tracking - change a prompt and only affected artifacts rebuild. The fundamental output is system prompt + RAG built from conversations with complete lineage.

## Key concepts

- **Artifact** - immutable, versioned build output (transcript, episode, rollup, core memory) with SHA256 content addressing
- **Layer** - typed pipeline stage (Source, Transform subclasses, SearchSurface, SynixSearch, FlatFile) with dependencies via object references  
- **Pipeline** - declared in Python via `Pipeline.add(*layers)` with automatic routing of transforms vs projections
- **Projection** - materializes artifacts into usable outputs (SearchSurface for build-time retrieval, SynixSearch for local search, FlatFile for markdown context)
- **Provenance** - every artifact traces back to source conversations, always included in search results
- **Cache/Rebuild** - fingerprint-based comparison of inputs, prompts, and model config determines what needs rebuilding

## Installation and quick start

```bash
# Install and create new project
uvx synix init my-project
cd my-project

# Add API key and build
export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-ant-...
uvx synix build

# Search and explore
uvx synix search "hiking"
uvx synix list
uvx synix show final-report
```

## CLI commands

- `uvx synix init <name>` - scaffold new project with sources and pipeline
- `uvx synix build` - run pipeline, only rebuilds changed artifacts
- `uvx synix plan` - dry-run showing what would build with cost estimates
- `uvx synix search <query>` - full-text and semantic search with provenance
- `uvx synix list [layer]` - show all artifacts, optionally filtered
- `uvx synix show <id>` - display artifact content and metadata
- `uvx synix lineage <id>` - show full provenance chain
- `uvx synix validate` - run validators against build artifacts (experimental)
- `uvx synix clean` - delete build directory
- `uvx synix runs list` - show immutable build snapshot history

## Architecture overview

```
src/synix/
├── __init__.py          # Public API: Pipeline, Source, Transform, SearchSurface, SynixSearch, FlatFile
├── core/models.py       # Layer hierarchy and Pipeline class
├── build/               # Build system: runner, DAG resolution, artifacts, transforms
├── search/              # Search plane: indexing, retrieval, embeddings
├── adapters/            # Source parsers (ChatGPT, Claude, text/markdown)
├── transforms/          # Generic platform transforms (Map, Group, Reduce, Fold)
├── ext/                 # Bundled memory transforms (EpisodeSummary, MonthlyRollup, etc.)
├── validators/          # Validation framework (PII, SemanticConflict, Citation)
├── cli/                 # Click CLI commands
└── templates/           # Demo pipelines and scaffolding
```

## Pipeline definition

Pipelines are Python code with real object references, not string dispatch:

```python
from synix import Pipeline, SearchSurface, Source, SynixSearch
from synix.transforms import MapSynthesis, ReduceSynthesis

pipeline = Pipeline("my-pipeline")
pipeline.llm_config = {"provider": "anthropic", "model": "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001"}

bios = Source("bios", dir="./sources/bios")
work_styles = MapSynthesis("work_styles", depends_on=[bios], 
    prompt="Infer work style:\n\n{artifact}", artifact_type="work_style")
report = ReduceSynthesis("report", depends_on=[work_styles],
    prompt="Write team analysis:\n\n{artifacts}", label="team-report")

search = SearchSurface("search", sources=[work_styles, report], modes=["fulltext"])
pipeline.add(bios, work_styles, report, search, SynixSearch("search", surface=search))
```

## Important constraints

- SQLite + filesystem only (no external databases, no Docker, no web server)
- Python 3.11+ required
- UV-native workflow (`uv sync`, `uv run synix`, `uv run pytest`)
- Fail-fast design - no silent error swallowing, validators/fixers fail closed by default
- Content-addressed artifacts with SHA256 identity
- LLM transforms must be stateless and deterministic for caching
- Local builds only (distributed mesh is experimental)
